description_long: This object is a classic fire extinguisher with a cylindrical red metal body and a rounded base. At the top, there is a prominent, curved handle and lever mechanism in a lighter shade, designed for manual operation. A black hose extends from the top, curving downward and ending in a cylindrical nozzle, which is used to direct the extinguishing agent. The hose is attached near the top and hangs freely along the side of the body. The surface appears smooth and hard, with no visible labels, signage, or pressure gauge. The overall design is utilitarian, with all essential components for emergency use clearly visible.
description: A red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a curved handle and a black hose ending in a nozzle, featuring a smooth, hard surface.
description_view_0: The main body, handle, and the full length of the black hose and nozzle are clearly visible from this angle.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the back of the handle and the top of the cylinder, with the hose mostly hidden.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the hose and nozzle, with the handle and body also visible.
description_view_3: A direct side view shows the hose running straight down the side of the cylinder, with the handle seen from the side.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, curving downward and ending in a cylindrical black nozzle, hanging freely along the side.
